title: Hodge-to-YM Functorial Transfer — Six Steps

analysis.object: T818: Hodge-to-YM Functorial Transfer — Six Steps depth analysis

step1_tropical_auto.description: Hodge Step 1: tropical auto-surjectivity (T725). YM analog: tropical auto-gap (T812).

step2_na_shadow.description: Hodge Step 2: NA shadow T758. YM analog: Berkovich gauge theory (T814 step 1).

step3_formal_model.description: Hodge Step 3: formal model T763. YM analog: formal gauge connection (T814 step 2).

step4_gaga.description: Hodge Step 4: formal GAGA T772. YM analog: formal GAGA for connections T814 step 3.

step5_resolution.description: Hodge Step 5: Hironaka + T775. YM analog: Uhlenbeck compactification + T815.

step6_pushforward.description: Hodge Step 6: pushforward T777. YM analog: decompactification + mass gap persistence T815.
step6_pushforward.reason: Both: extending from compact to full space

t818_theorem.description: T818: SIX-STEP HODGE PROOF TRANSFERS FUNCTORIALLY TO SIX-STEP YM PROOF via DUY functor. Each Hodge step has a YM analog. The transfer is natural (DUY is a natural transformation). T818.
t818_theorem.reason: Six-step YM proof by functorial transfer from Hodge

analysis.theorem: T818: Hodge-to-YM Functorial Transfer — Six Steps (S1097).

key_theorem: T818: Hodge-to-YM Functorial Transfer — Six Steps (S1097).
